title: EZ FPS And The Features
description: EZ FPS & Features enhances Minecraft performance with needed features, specially designed for low-end PCs! 🚀
body:
# EZ FPS & Features 🚀  
Tired of lag? Get smoother gameplay with **EZ FPS & Features**, designed for **low-end PCs**!

## Plug & play — jump straight into PvP or survival with instant performance and pre-built resource packs.

## UPDATE: EZ FPS AND THE FEATURES  POJAV VERSION IS ALSO NOW AVAILABLE [https://modrinth.com/modpack/ezfpspojav](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ezfpspojav)

## 🔥 Why Choose EZ FPS?  
- Based on **[Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)** & **[Remarkably Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/remarkably)**  
- Perfect for **FPS boost pack**  
- Optimized settings for **maximum performance**  
- Includes **PvP-enhancing mods** for better gameplay  

<details>
<summary>frequently asked questions</summary>

## why my game crashes on 1.8.9?
### ans-our modpack requires java 17+ to run 1.8.9 properly

</details>


## ⚡ Insane Performance Gains  
Tested on:  
💻 **Intel i3-2310M (Linux)**  
🛠️ **8GB DDR3 RAM**  
🎮 **Intel HD 3000**  
✅ **90+ FPS Achieved!**  

⚡ **What are you waiting for? Download EZ FPS & Features today!**
